primary_goal: forest health, wildlife habitat, possible timber value
notes_from_call: Landowner said neighbor suggested hardwood may be worth looking at. Wants to understand options and avoid damage to woods. Asked whether now is right time or if waiting makes sense.
sensitive_fields_to_verify: acreage, location, stand condition, ownership, timber value, visit availability
suggested_activity: Draft a careful landowner follow-up email and next-step checklist.

primary_goal: income from selective harvest, road access questions
notes_from_call: Family has owned property for decades. They are interested in a responsible harvest but unsure about access roads and timing. Mentioned wet ground in spring.
sensitive_fields_to_verify: property access, road conditions, owner goals, market assumptions
suggested_activity: Create an internal summary and questions for a forester to ask before a site visit.

notes_from_call: Recent wind event took down trees along the north edge. Landowner wants to know if damaged timber should be salvaged quickly.
sensitive_fields_to_verify: damage extent, species, safety/access, insurance/contract status
suggested_activity: Draft a response that does not promise value or urgency before review.

notes_from_call: Owner wants to improve future value and wildlife habitat. Asked about maple and oak, but has no inventory data.
sensitive_fields_to_verify: species mix, inventory, management history, owner objectives
suggested_activity: Turn call notes into a site-visit prep checklist.

notes_from_call: Asked whether MFL enrollment affects harvest planning. Wants plain-language explanation and next steps.
sensitive_fields_to_verify: MFL status, legal/tax details, DNR requirements, property details
suggested_activity: Draft a message that recommends qualified review and avoids legal/tax advice.
